calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-04-2020 Off Calendar

Motion To Enter Default Judgment In Favor Of Plaintiff Tony C. Lei Against Chadwick P. Houser
Off Calendar Jan-16-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Chadwick P. Houser, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Maria Viscio, CSR #12353. Telephone: 415-551-0610. Email: mviscio@sftc.org.

Barry Fischer, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Tony C. Lei, an individual, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Chadwick P. Houser, an individual.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract, Fraud & Deceit was filed on July 31, 2017.
Order permitting plaintiff to serve Summons & Complaint via publication was filed on February 20, 2018.
Amended Order permitting service of Summons & Complaint via publication was filed on November 26, 2018.
Proof of Publication of Summons & Complaint was filed with the Clerk's Office on May 8, 2019.
Default as to defendant Chadwick P. Houser, an individual, was entered on May 28, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on May 21, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Tony C. Lei, an individual, and against the defaulted defendant Chadwick P. Houser, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $96,800.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $116,443.
Attorney Fees - $14,520.00.
Costs - $3,369.00.

Total - $231,132.00.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2019 Continued To Feb-25-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
